Photos of the Set-up — Geneva International Music Competition, October 2009

Photos of the set-up used as a basis by some performers during the Geneva International Music Competition, 1st round preliminary, October 2009. Click to enlarge.

Set-up featuring: Wood chimes, Glass chimes (lamp bulbs), Metal can chimes, Seashell chimes, Tam-tams, 8 Cymbals, Bongos, Tom-toms, Bass drum
